microsoft_ft: Embedded with **enterprise customers** (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp) to deploy Azure resilience solutions end-to-end, translating complex business requirements into technical architectures that drove **$14M+ impact** across 45+ annual drills.

Deployed an **internal AI agent** for drill planning workflows, applying LLM-powered automation and prompt engineering to cut planning cycle time by 39% and scale drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Operated as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, coordinating 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility in high-stakes, ambiguous environments.

Translated non-technical stakeholder requirements into backend system architectures and monitoring frameworks, acting as the primary technical-to-business communication layer for customer-facing resilience programs.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing the website and Google profile to capture high-intent inbound leads more effectively.
